gate.acknowledgement: We acknowledge the Wurundjeri Woi-wurrung and Bunurong / Boon Wurrung peoples of the Kulin Nation as the Sovereign Custodians of the lands where we work and gather in Naarm (Melbourne). We pay deep respect to their Elders—past and present—and recognise that sovereignty was never ceded.
gate.acknowledgement2: We likewise honour the ancestors and the many nations across the Australian and Indonesian archipelagos. We stand in the 300-year legacy of the Yolngu-Macassan trade bridge; a relationship built on kinship and reciprocal exchange.
gate.acknowledgement3: Wherever you are joining us from, we invite you to honour the Traditional Custodians of the land beneath your feet.
gate.welcome: Welcome to the future of exchange.

hero.headline: Old Wisdom, New Markets:
hero.subheadline: Nafasz Global is a boutique advisory pioneering equitable sovereign wealth transitions. We convene Industry Leaders, First Nations Sovereignty, and Global Capital to co-design and architect resilient industrial consortiums across the Indo-Pacific.

legacy.label: The Legacy
legacy.title: The 300-Year Bridge
legacy.p1: We honour the Yolngu people of North-East Arnhem Land. For centuries, they sat in a circle with the Macassans of Sulawesi—building a trade bridge grounded in reciprocity, not extraction.
legacy.p2: This pre-colonial exchange model informs the operating philosophy of Nafasz Global: stewardship, continuity, and shared prosperity.

pillars.label: Strategy
pillars.title: Our Pillars
pillars.p1_desc: Transitioning industry from transactional extraction → intergenerational participation.
pillars.p2_desc: Operationalising Social Licence through structured First Nations engagement and consent frameworks.
pillars.p3_desc: Advancing a Future Made in Australia supply chain axis through IA-CEPA, aligned with Indonesia's 2045 industrial transformation—where policy certainty, sovereign coordination, and strategic capital converge to deliver integrated, execution-ready outcomes.
pillars.p4_desc: Embedding predictive systems and digital twins to de-risk industrial corridors.

circle.label: The Circle
circle.title: Our Ecosystem
circle.vision: To architect bilateral sovereign wealth systems that honour ancestry while advancing 21st-century markets.
circle.mission: To originate and execute mandates where Indigenous sovereignty and global capital co-design long-term value.

bridge.label: The Bridge
bridge.title: Operating Model
bridge.phase1_desc: Deep engagement with Traditional Custodians, community leaders, and sovereign stakeholders to understand the land, the law, and the legacy.
bridge.phase2_desc: Structuring mandates that align First Nations sovereignty frameworks with institutional capital requirements and bilateral policy corridors.
bridge.phase3_desc: Deploying capital, technology, and governance structures that deliver intergenerational value across the Australia–Indonesia corridor.

funnel.label: Connect
funnel.question: We are weaving the future of exchange. What vision would you bring to shape the next 300 years with us?
funnel.calendly: Initial Discovery Briefing with the Director
funnel.success_desc: Your vision has been received. We will be in touch to schedule your Initial Discovery Briefing with the Director.
